title: Soulection Radio Show #457
content: Joe Kay solo in his home studio featuring music from [MXXWLL](https://soundcloud.com/mxxwllofficial), [Vikaden](https://soundcloud.com/vikaden) and [Juls](https://soundcloud.com/julsofficialmusic).
